scenario: Repeated charging notifications appear when one earbud is in the open charging case while the other is worn on Voyager Free 20
description_clean: When using Poly Voyager Free 20 with one earbud worn and the other placed in the open, unplugged charging case, repeated charging notifications appear instead of a single notification indicating the earbud is charging.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Navigate to Home screen and ensure Poly Voyager Free 20 is connected.
Remove one earbud from the charging case and place it in your ear.
Place the other earbud back into the open, unplugged charging case (case not connected to power).
Observe the notification behavior on the Android device for the earbud placed in the charging case.
expected: A single notification should appear indicating the earbud is charging.
actual: Repeated charging notifications appear instead of a single notification.
